Explicitly stated in task description and checked in export_result.sh.
Confirmed script exists in the environment at this path.
Directly querying earthquake.usgs.gov with the mainshock constraints (M>=4.5, 1.5 degree radius, 24h window) returned 36 real aftershocks, safely meeting the minimum expected criteria of 3.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real earthquake data from the USGS FDSN Event Catalog for the 2024 Noto Peninsula, Japan Earthquake (Mainshock ID us6000m0xl). The mainshock parameters (Magnitude 7.5, Noto Peninsula) exactly match the bundled XML metadata. The expected output file paths (aftershocks_usgs.xml, aftershocks.scml, imported_events.csv) are confirmed via export_result.sh validation scripts. Querying the live USGS API with the requested parameters (M>=4.5, 1.5 deg radius, 24h window) returns 36 aftershocks, satisfying the minimum threshold of 3.
